channel.title: Posts on notamaan.xyz
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on notamaan.xyz

item.title: 😈 Scamming Scammers (Gone Wrong!) 😱
item.description: recently I was looking for side hustle opportunities to make some money on the side. During my research, I came across a great way to do this: online tutoring. Long story short, I created a profile on superprof.ie and was contacted by scammers. This is…

item.title: 🛠️ Hacking My Router for Fun and Profit 💰
item.description: hi guys, I am back with another exciting blog.

item.title: 🧑‍💻Learning C2 with Sliver🛰️
item.description: hi guys, I hope everyone is still goin strong with their new year resolutions 😀

item.title: 🕵️ Hunting for Leaked Secrets on Github (I Used AI) 🤖
item.description: The research presented is purely for educational purposes on already-public data and must not be used to attempt unauthorized access.

item.title: My Experience with OSCP 🐉
item.description: Hi guys, This is going to be the first post on my website and I am not really used to writing long blog posts so please excuse my writing style which may come off as a bit rough around the edges.

item.title: Tunnels! Best Way to Access your Home Network from Outside 🚇🏠🌍
item.description: One of my most cherished memories is the day I realized that my cousin, sitting in his house, could not connect to my minecraft server even after I gave him my IP address and port number! I remember thinking that all those youtube tutorials fooled me into…
